line.dialogue: Swordsmith Deity, from your unseen throne, bless this sword with your mighty hone! This new sword is guaranteed to defend you against Princess Bubblegum's heinous family. Uncle Gumbald!

line.stage: CLANK

line.dialogue: Aunt Lolly!

line.stage: CLANK

line.dialogue: Cousin Chicle!

line.stage: CLANK

line.dialogue: I like your swordsmith hat.
I'm wearing it in honor of my special guest.
Am I your special guest?
No.
Dang.

line.stage: The sword sizzles as peppermint butler dips it into a bucket of water

line.dialogue: This sword will serve you much better than your old, cursed Grass Sword. This sword is also cursed, but it has a compass in the hilt!
Neat!
And now for one more thing; The special guest I now will bring!

line.stage: Peppermint Butler smashes a container of bug milk over a drawing of a PHIL FACE

line.dialogue: Maloso vobiscum et cum spiritum!

line.stage: Hunson Abadeer emerges from the newly formed flames

line.dialogue: Hunson Abadeer!
Finn the Human! And Jake the Dog! Hey, did Marceline call me-?
It is I who summoned you. I humbly ask you for an infusion of Nightosphere magic upon this sword.
Okay.
I proclaim this blade Ow! Ow! "The Night Sword"! Now to send you back.
Not so fast. It's like I got a free flight here. I'm gonna go see my little girl.
Back in the hole, Marceline's dad.
I'll behave myself. No soul sucking, no evil stuff. I'm trying to be a better person. Maybe it's too late for me, but I'm trying. Oh, I'm so ashamed of the things I've done! crying
Have some dignity, man! All right. You may leave the circle for one day.
Wheeeeee! Ha-ha-ha-ha! Time to suck some souls! sucking

line.stage: Peppermint Butler uses the Night Sword to enchant handcuffs on Hunson.

line.dialogue: Hey, what gives?
Phantom manacles your wrists shall constrain until you're back in your hole again! Finn.
Let's go see Marcy.
Great sword making, Pep But.
Yo, see you guys at the concert!
singing Walkin' in ooo, not suckin' out souls Walk, walk, walk, not suck, suck, suck Walk, walk, walk, not suck, suck, suck.
Hey, could you stop saying that, please?
So what's my little monster up to these days? Is she still all goody-goody? Still half-vampire? Started dating anyone?
Yes, yes, but no, then yes again, and maybe? Look, maybe cool it with the prying around Marceline.
Nah, she loves it when I pry.
chuckles Oh, Chicle, have you finally discovered the vampire girl's weakness? I think sooo.chuckles Chuckling mode off.
whistling "SHAVE AND A HAIRCUT" You know, now that we're here, I'm having second thoughts. It just seems like no matter what I do, I always tick that girl off.

line.stage: flashback

line.dialogue: crashes through Marceline's newly-made bunker Marceline! Long time no see. Some goober with glasses summoned me. What's that thing? Just gonna put this here, okay? Now let's go suck some souls!
present day I don't know what it is.
Finn and Jake drawing a PHIL face to send Hunson back to the Nightosphere Uhh, heh.
clears throat Psst-psst points to Marceline, who is staring at Hunson through the window.
Dad, what are you doing here?
I'm in town for the week, and I don't really have a place to stay, dot, dot, dot.
Mnh. How many souls did he suck on his way here?
Oh, I guess like zero. But-
See! I made Finn a cool, new sword and everything!
I guess you can crash here.
Great! Thanks for inviting me.
That is not what's happening.
We're gonna jet, Marcy.
What?! You just got here. Invite them in, Marceline.

line.stage: Marceline waves them inside

line.dialogue: Do you have a bathroom?
Yeah, there's one upstairs.
I just have to freshen up.
Is my dad really behaving himself this time?
He's just been singing songs and stuff.
Yeah, he seems pretty fun for an old guy. Hey, wait a minute... I'm an old guy!
Hey, excuse my unsociableness. There's just one thing; The Venetian blinds in your bathroom kind of jumped out at me and got broken.
How could you wreck the blinds just by going to the bathroom?
Let me make it up to you. I've got some soy sauce and some ketchup.
I'm good.
Here's an SD card, some twist ties.
I don't want any of this junk!
Hey! I'm gonna need a place to sleep tonight. Do you have an air mattress?
Yeah.
Great! You can sleep on the air mattress, and I'll sleep on your bed.
It's in the closet.
Finn, are you gonna let my little girl blow up that air mattress?
Not on my watch!
Hey, Dad, I think I'm gonna go out for a walk before bedtime.
But, Marcy don't you have a solo gig tonight?
Ss-ss-ss-ss!
I get it. It's air mattress talk. Ss-ss-ss-ss. Aren't you giving a concert tonight? Ss-ss-ss. At the Ghost Amphitheater? Ss-ss-ss.
Concert? It's a good thing your friends remembered that.
Thanks, Jake.
Let's go!
Do you hear, like, a really stupid-sounding laugh?
Yes.
I have a nice laugh.

line.stage: Finn, Jake, Marceline, and Hunson enter the Cemetery

line.dialogue: Time to blend in completely unnoticed. He phases into a ghost disguise
Hey, what you got there? Peanuts?
Hello, Hamburger Hills Cemetery!

line.stage: Marceline appears in a fog on stage, and the audience cheers and applauds

line.dialogue: Marceline! You're doing great, baby!
I haven't started yet.sings Slow Dance With You
Hey, Pennebaker! No illegal recording unless you're family. Yoink. whispering Just ignore me.
Dad! You're wrecking the show!
This is my daughter! I am proud of my punk daughter! I made that!
Sit down, man!
Yeah, you're killing the vibe.
I'm just explaining my part in all this.
Ugh. This is terrible. Boo, I say.
Yeah! Boooo!

line.stage: crowds starts booing

line.dialogue: Don't worry, honey. I'll work the crowd. Hey, it's me Hunson! I'm happy to field any questions from you dummies.
Can you believe Marceline has a bougie trash daddy? I heard this guy even eats ghosts, you know, like us.
What? Really?!
Sure, sometimes.
Off the stage, skin sack!
Okay, okay, settle down, pal. Don't make me come out there.
What you gonna do "eat my fries?"

line.stage: one of the ghosts spits some ectoplasm into his hand, and throws it at Hunson, but he dodges it and it instead hits Marcline's bass

line.dialogue: gasps My bass!

line.stage: laughter

line.dialogue: Come on, ectoplasm comes right off. goes to lick it off
Don't! You wreck everything.

line.stage: laughter
Hunson jumps out into the crowd to attack the heckling ghosts

line.dialogue: Mad daddy!
Hammer fist strike!
Let's get him, fellas.
Ha-ha!

line.stage: The ghosts turn red and attack Hunson

line.dialogue: Dad, quit clowning.
Uh, just havin' a little fun.tries to turn his hand into a claw, but is restrained by the handcuffs
Come on, Dad, fight back!
He can't. Pep Buts bound his powers.
What?!
They sassed you.
Better pop that cork, Peps.
All right. All right.

line.stage: Chicle throws a peanut at Peppermint Butler's head, which knocks him to the ground
Chicle morphs back into his original form

line.dialogue: Chicle!
Oh, whoops, was that bad? laughs, and becomes invisible

line.stage: The ghosts begin to entrap Hunson. Marceline flings her bass at them, but it phases through.

line.dialogue: Vampires can't hurt ghosts, stupid.
the ghosts fully trap the two of them in their tentacle-like arms Shoot.
Finn's turn! Finn uses the night sword to cut Marceline and Hunson free
Wha?!
morphs into a bat monster and flies them away Good night, Hamburger Hills! There will be no encore.
My gracious. I'm so sorry you had to deal with Cousin Chicle's schemes. My family's out of control.

It's fine. My cool daughter took care of it. And guess what I got from a vendor. pulls out a big shirt with Marceline's face on it It looks too big to me. But they said that's the style now with punk rockers.
Thanks for standing up for me tonight.
I'm bad, but I'm no so bad, right? So when are you gonna have some kids?
Dad!
